creator: nonomura@nifty.com
text:
em driver failed to initialize with following error

----
em0: <Intel(R) PRO/1000 Network Connection Version - 6.2.9> port 0x2000-0x201f mem 0xee000000-0xee01ffff irq 16 at device 0.0 on pci2
em0: Reserved 0x20000 bytes for rid 0x10 type 3 at 0xee000000
em0: Reserved 0x20 bytes for rid 0x18 type 4 at 0x2000
em0: The EEPROM Checksum Is Not Valid
em0: Unable to initialize the hardware
device_attach: em0 attach returned 5
----
